description: Hercules is an AI app builder for creating and publishing web apps, internal tools, e-commerce sites, and mobile apps by chatting with AI. It provides built-in hosting, backend, database, auth, payments, and related app-platform features.
summary: Hercules exposes an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at `https://hercules.app/mcp`; no separate public REST/GraphQL API or Hercules-owned CLI was found in the public docs.
